creator: blapp@attic.ch
text:
The KDE1.0-port does not compile without modifications because the qt-includes changed location to /usr/local/includes/qt.

Fix: 

Adjust the 'Makefile' of kdelibs or move the qt-includes to /usr/X11R6/include/X11/qt
How-To-Repeat: Just try to install KDE on a fresh installed FreeBSD 2.2.7 stable after 'cvsuping' the ports ...
